Photo by Timothy Lethbridge

National Arts Centre and Peace Tower

A view taken while canoeing on the Rideau Canal near the Rogers Centre. On the left is the National Arts Centre. The Peace Tower is visible in the centre. The old railway station, current Senate is on the right.

Photo by Timothy Lethbridge

Rideau Falls in Ottawa

The Rideau Falls and Ottawa River. The MacDonald-Cartier Bridge is in the background.

Photo by Timothy Lethbridge

National Gallery of Canada, Ottawa

A view of the National Gallery of Ottawa

Rogers Centre Ottawa

Description

Photo by Timothy Lethbridge

Alexandra Bridge, Ottawa

The Alexandra Bridge over the Ottawa River taken from behind Parliament

Photo by Vladyslaw

Parliament, Ottawa

View of Parliament facing South in Ottawa

Welcome to ICSE 2025

ICSE, the IEEE/ACM International Conference on Software Engineering, is the premier software engineering conference. It was held April 27-May 3 2025 in Ottawa. Core conference days were Wednesday April 30 to Friday May 2.

This page is for the historical record. The proceedings are available here.

See you all in 2026 in Rio

2025 marks the 50th anniversary of ICSE, which was first held in 1975!

If you are registered, pick up your badge and envelope at the registration desk which opens at 8 a.m. Sunday April 27th in the RCC area of the second floor of the Rogers Centre. It will open at 8 a.m. every morning throughout the conference, except Wednesday April 30th when it will open at 7:30 a.m.. It will remain open until about 5:30 most days. If you are not registered yet, you can register online or in person at the registration desk.

ICSE provides a forum where researchers, practitioners, and educators gather together to present and discuss research results, innovations, trends, experiences and issues in the field of software engineering.


Key pages:

Program Filterable by Day, Room and Activity    Links to Key Program Elements    Your Program (if you have selected choices)

Social Media    Presenting    Virtual Attendance

Registration    Getting around Ottawa    Sustainability

Browse the menus above for many other useful pages.

Latest News

  • Wed 7 May 2025 by Timothy Lethbridge

    ICSE Keynote talks are on our Youtube Channel

    Videos of ICSE2025 keynote presentations are now on our YouTube Channel! https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLn0nrSd4xjjbN8wKDVIILTsfNVU1f7DVb Other session videos will follow in the coming weeks, as we receive requests.

  • Thu 1 May 2025 by Christian Cabrera

    SEAMS 2025 Wrap-up

    We had a fantastic SEAMS 2025 in Ottawa with a high-quality program comprising eleven long, six short, and two artifact papers, two outstanding keynotes by Jane Cleland-Huang and Bashar Nuseibeh, and a highly interactive panel on self-adaptive systems and AI. Throughout SEAMS 2025, we have seen lively discussions in all sessions.

    Many thanks to all authors, attendees, and members of the program and organization committees for making SEAMS 2025 such a success.

    As in previous years, …

    read full article
